architectureDecision.label: Machine + maintainer docs
architectureDecision.rationale: Inventory in .ai/runbooks/ci-baseline-inventory.md with maintainer mirror; task metadata links both; branch protection via gh/API only.

readyReview.decision: Inventory deliverable in .ai/ and docs/maintainers/; branch-protection evidence from gh/GitHub API only.

technicalBreakdown: Run gh api / gh rulesets to capture required checks for main and release/phase-* (no UI-only evidence).
Summarize recent Actions runs: job timings, duplicate build/test/pack/parity.
Document skip-safe path classes and migration note for branch protection.

acceptanceCriteria: Current required checks are identified via gh/API output, including aggregator vs leaf job requirements.
Recent CI and publish run timings are summarized with duplicated build/test/pack/parity work called out.
Skip-safe evidence/status paths are listed with rationale and excluded from code-affecting categories.
Migration note identifies branch protection changes; inventory exists in .ai/ and docs/maintainers/ runbooks.
